title: Mass vaccination device
abstract: Disclosed is a device for mass vaccinations of humans. The device includes a replaceable needle cartridge, a needle driving mechanism, and a vaccine container.
claims: Claims CLAIMS In the claims: 1. A device for mass vaccinations of humans comprising: a replaceable needle cartridge; a needle driving mechanism; and a vaccine container. 2. A device according to claim 1 wherein said replaceable cartridge comprises a plurality of needle sleeves. 3. A device according to claim 2 wherein each needle sleeve of said plurality of needle sleeves comprises: a needle; and a spring. 4. A device according to claim 1 wherein said needle driving mechanism comprises a needle piston. 5. A device according to claim 1 further comprising a fluid transfer tube for transferring a vaccine from said vaccine container to said needle driving mechanism. 6. A device according to claim 1 further comprising a protection mechanism to prevent biological material contamination. 7. A device according to claim 2 further comprising a flexible belt interconnecting said plurality of sleeves. 8. A device according to claim 1 further comprising a cartridge drive unit. 9. A device according to claim 1 further comprising a feeder tube. 10. A device according to claim 1 further comprising a filter. 11. A device according to claim 1 further comprising sterilization means for sterilizing needles. 12. A device according to claim 1 further comprising a pump. 13. A device according to claim 1 wherein said replaceable needle cartridge and said needle driving mechanism are housed in an injector unit. 14. A device according to claim 13 wherein said injector unit is configured to be held with one hand. 15. A device according to claim 1 wherein said vaccine container is housed in a supply unit. 16. A device according to claim 1 wherein said supply unit is configured to be carried as a backpack. 17. A device according to claim 1 wherein said supply unit is configured to be carried as a belt bag.
